task:
In Brave, open three tabs to https://httpbin.org/get, https://httpbin.org/headers, and https://httpbin.org/ip and bookmark all three. Then redirect the https://httpbin.org/get tab to https://httpbin.org/user-agent (without removing the existing bookmark for /get).

When done, the three open tabs must be https://httpbin.org/user-agent, https://httpbin.org/headers, and https://httpbin.org/ip; bookmarks must exist for https://httpbin.org/get, https://httpbin.org/headers, and https://httpbin.org/ip; and https://httpbin.org/get must appear in browsing history.

verification.description: httpbin.org/get was visited in browsing history
